response.justification: Bogdan's extensive experience (10+ years) as a Senior Software Developer and Staff Engineer is significantly above the entry-level junior role. While he meets some required qualifications (Java, agile methodologies, cloud technologies), his overqualification, lack of recent Java-focused roles, and limited German language proficiency (basic) make him a poor fit for this position. His expertise in multiple languages and senior roles suggests he would likely seek higher-level positions.
strengths: Proficient in Java and object-oriented programming
Experience with agile development methodologies and CI/CD practices
Strong background in software development across multiple domains
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level junior role (10+ years of senior experience)
German language proficiency is only basic, below the required fluent level
Lacks recent or dedicated experience in Java-focused roles (prefers Node.js, TypeScript, Dlang)
